subcodes.first_line: O thou who holdest fast to the hem of the Covenant! When the Luminary of the horizons shed its light from the horizon of Iraq, it shone resplendently in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تشبث بذیل المیثاق ان نیر الافاق لما اشرق من افق العراق سطع اشراقا فی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
